nasb.text: and how the chief priests and our rulers delivered Him to the sentence of death, and crucified Him.

esv.text: and how our chief priests and rulers delivered him up to be condemned to death, and crucified him.

cnv.text: 我們的祭司長和官長，竟把他交出去，判了死罪，釘在十字架上。

ccb.text: 我们的祭司长和官长却把祂押去判了死刑，钉在十字架上。

csbs.text: 我们的祭司长们和首领们竟把他交出去，判了死罪，钉上十字架。
